question:
If there is an "RQ" before or after the item description on the shipping paper, it means that
1) the carrier must report any spill of this material.
2) the material is in a package containing no other materials.
3) the material has an insurance value of over $1,000.00.
canonical_answer: the carrier must report any spill of this material.

appears_in.answer: the carrier must report any spill of this material.
